title: OpenAI API
description: Access GPT-4, GPT-3.5, DALL-E, and Whisper models via REST API. Industry-standard LLM platform with extensive documentation.

title: LangChain
description: Framework for building applications powered by LLMs. Provides chains, agents, memory, and tool integrations.

title: Hugging Face Hub
description: Open-source platform for collaborative AI. Host and discover models, datasets, and spaces.

title: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that suggests code and entire functions in your IDE. Supports multiple languages and editors.

title: Ollama
description: Run open-source LLMs locally. Supports Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, and many more models with a simple API.

title: Microsoft Semantic Kernel
description: SDK for integrating LLMs into enterprise applications with plugins, memory, and goal-oriented planning.

title: AI Governance Checklist
description: Internal reference document covering responsible AI usage, data privacy, model validation, and compliance requirements.
